description_long: This is a modern, rectangular shelving unit with a black top surface and a white body. The structure features two open horizontal shelves divided into three compartments, providing ample storage or display space. The left side of the unit is enclosed, while the right side remains open, giving it an asymmetrical and contemporary appearance. The top surface is flat and solid, suitable for supporting objects such as electronics, books, or decorative items. The overall design is minimalist, with clean lines and no visible handles, doors, or decorative elements. The materials appear to be engineered wood or laminate, making it suitable for urban environments such as offices, lobbies, or public waiting areas.
description: A modern, rectangular shelving unit with a black top and white open shelves, featuring a minimalist, asymmetrical design. The unit offers multiple compartments for storage or display.
description_view_0: Front view showing the black top, two open shelves with three compartments, and the left side panel.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the black top and the open shelving structure.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the solid left panel and the open right side, with the shelving compartments visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the solid left panel and the open shelf structure from the other end.
